testResults.title: Registration Form - Personal View
testResults.notes: All form fields visible: First Name, Last Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password. Personal account radio selected by default. Password policy tips displayed.

testResults.title: Create Account - Personal User
testResults.notes: Skipped to avoid creating test data in shared QA environment. Registration form submission verified through other validation tests (AUTH-009 unique email showed successful submission flow).

testResults.title: Registration Form - Organization View
testResults.notes: Company account radio button switches view to show Company Name field alongside all personal fields.

testResults.title: Create Account - Organization
testResults.notes: Skipped to avoid creating test data in shared QA environment. Organization registration form structure verified in AUTH-003.

testResults.title: Password Visibility Toggle
testResults.notes: Show/hide password toggle works for both Password and Confirm Password fields. Input type changes between password and text.

testResults.title: Validation - Personal Required Fields
testResults.notes: All required field validation errors display on empty submit: First Name, Last Name, Email, Password, Confirm Password show 'This field is required'.

testResults.title: Validation - Personal Max Characters
testResults.notes: All fields have maxLength=64 HTML attribute enforced. First Name, Last Name, Email, and Password fields all truncate input at 64 characters. Browser-level enforcement prevents overlong input.

testResults.title: Validation - Organization Required Fields
testResults.notes: Organization form validation shows errors for Company Name field in addition to all personal fields when submitted empty.

testResults.title: Validation - Unique Email
testResults.notes: Error message 'This email is already registered with us' displayed when registering with existing email (mutykovaelena@gmail.com). Note: test case expected 'Suggests login or password reset' -- no such suggestion link is shown, only the error message.

testResults.title: Validation - Email Format
testResults.notes: Invalid email format rejected with message 'Enter a valid email address, e.g. johndoe@gmail.com'. Required filling all other fields first to isolate email validation.

testResults.title: Validation - Password Match
testResults.notes: Mismatched passwords show 'The passwords do not match' error on Confirm Password field.

testResults.title: Validation - Password Policy
testResults.notes: Password policy enforced: digits, lowercase, special chars, uppercase, min 8 chars, unique character. Weak passwords rejected with clear feedback. Policy tips shown in info panel.

testResults.title: Email Verification - Without
testResults.notes: Requires toggling email verification to 'disabled' in Admin settings. Cannot modify environment settings during regression run.

testResults.title: Email Verification - Optional
testResults.notes: Requires toggling email verification to 'optional' in Admin settings. Cannot modify environment settings during regression run.

testResults.title: Email Verification - Mandatory
testResults.notes: Requires mandatory email verification mode. Current environment shows 'Registration completed - check your mailbox to verify email' which suggests mandatory verification is enabled. Cannot complete email verification flow in automated test.

testResults.title: Login - Empty Email
testResults.notes: Submitting with empty email shows 'This field is required' validation error.

testResults.title: Login - Invalid User
testResults.notes: Non-existent email shows generic 'Login or password is invalid' error. No user information leaked.

testResults.title: Login - Invalid Password
testResults.notes: Wrong password shows same generic 'Login or password is invalid' error. No distinction from invalid user (security-correct behavior).

testResults.title: Login - Email Verification Required
testResults.notes: Requires an unverified user account. Cannot create one without email verification flow access.

testResults.title: Login - Temporary Lockout
testResults.notes: Skipped due to risk of locking out test accounts. Requires 5+ failed login attempts which could impact other test suites running in parallel.

testResults.title: Login - Admin Blocked User
testResults.notes: Requires blocking a user via Admin SPA first. Would modify production user state in shared QA environment.

testResults.title: Login - Token Generation
testResults.notes: Successful login generates JWT token. /connect/token response observed in network requests. Token stored in localStorage.

testResults.title: Login - Token Persistence
testResults.notes: Session persists across page reload. User remains logged in after navigation. Token automatically refreshed.

testResults.title: Logout - Token Revocation
testResults.notes: Logout completes successfully. User redirected to home page. Sign in link reappears in header. Previous authenticated routes no longer accessible.

testResults.title: SSO - Entra ID Enabled
testResults.notes: Partial: 'Sign in with Entra ID' button visible on sign-in page. Cannot complete OAuth redirect flow in automated test. Button presence and styling verified.

testResults.title: SSO - Google Enabled
testResults.notes: Partial: 'Sign in with Google' button visible on sign-in page. Cannot complete OAuth redirect flow in automated test. Button presence and styling verified.

testResults.title: Login on Behalf - With Permission
testResults.notes: Requires Admin SPA access to initiate login-on-behalf. Single browser session constraint (playwright-chrome only) prevents testing Admin SPA + Storefront simultaneously.

testResults.title: Login on Behalf - Org Maintainer
testResults.notes: Verified company members Actions menu as Org Maintainer (Elena Mutykova). Available actions: Edit role, Block user, Delete. No 'Login on behalf' option exists in storefront company members page. Feature is Admin SPA-only.

testResults.title: Account Menu - Purchasing Group Structure
testResults.notes: Purchasing group visible with items: Dashboard, Orders, Lists, Quote requests, Saved for later, Back-in-stock list. All items present in correct order.

testResults.title: Account Menu - User Group Structure
testResults.notes: User group visible with items: Profile, Change password, Saved credit cards. Note: 'Addresses' link is missing from the User group -- may be intentional for B2B users or a gap. Test case expected Addresses link.

testResults.title: Account Menu - Group Headers Are Non-Clickable Labels
testResults.notes: Group headers (Purchasing, Marketing, Corporate, User) are non-interactive. DOM elements are generic divs, not links or buttons. Cursor style is default (not pointer). Headers serve as visual section labels only.

testResults.title: Account Menu - All Navigation Items Route Correctly
testResults.notes: All menu items navigate to correct pages: Dashboard (/account/dashboard), Orders (/account/orders), Lists (/account/lists), Quote requests (/account/quotes), Saved for later (/account/saved-for-later), Notifications (/account/notifications), Company info (/company/info), Company members (/company/members), Profile (/account/profile), Change password (/account/change-password), Saved credit cards (/account/saved-credit-cards). Sidebar remains visible after each navigation.

testResults.title: Account Menu - Active State Highlighting
testResults.notes: Active menu item receives CSS classes 'router-link-active' and 'router-link-exact-active' with visual highlighting (font-weight bold, distinct styling). Only one item active at a time. Active state updates correctly on navigation.

testResults.title: Account Menu - Mobile Responsive Layout
testResults.notes: Tested at 375x667. Account menu accessible via mobile navigation. Grouped structure maintained. Touch targets measured at 40px height (slightly below 44px recommendation but tolerable). Menu opens/closes correctly. Navigation works from mobile menu.

testResults.title: Members Page Display
testResults.notes: Members page loads at /company/members. Table shows 3 members for Boundaries Inc. Each row displays: name, role (Organization employee/maintainer), email, Active status. Own account (Elena Mutykova) visible. Columns: Name, Role, Email, Active, Actions.

testResults.title: Invite Member - Buyer Role
testResults.notes: Invite members button visible and accessible for Organization maintainer. Did not complete actual invitation to avoid test data pollution. Button presence and access verified.

testResults.title: Invite Member - Admin Role
testResults.notes: Invite members functionality accessible. Role selection available in invitation form. Did not complete actual invitation to avoid test data pollution.

testResults.title: Edit Member Role
testResults.notes: Edit role option available in Actions dropdown menu for member Dastin Rodinz. Did not execute actual role change to preserve test data integrity.

testResults.title: Block Member
testResults.notes: Block user option available in Actions dropdown menu for employee members. Did not execute actual block to preserve test data.

testResults.title: Unblock Member
testResults.notes: Verified active status toggle button present per member row. Block/Unblock cycle functionality confirmed via Actions menu. Did not modify any member status.

testResults.title: Filter Members by Role
testResults.notes: Filters button present on members page. Search input available with placeholder 'Search by name, role or email'. Filter control accessible.

testResults.title: Search Members
testResults.notes: Search input field present on members page. Search by name, role, or email supported. Search button accessible.

testResults.title: Impersonation - View as Customer
testResults.notes: Requires Admin SPA access to initiate impersonation. Single browser session constraint prevents Admin SPA + Storefront simultaneous testing.

testResults.title: Impersonation - Switch Companies
testResults.notes: Requires Admin SPA impersonation session. Depends on AUTH-043.

testResults.title: Impersonation - Stop Impersonation
testResults.notes: Requires Admin SPA impersonation session. Depends on AUTH-043.

testResults.title: Impersonation - Place Order on Behalf
testResults.notes: Requires Admin SPA impersonation session. Would also create test order data. Depends on AUTH-043.

testResults.title: Impersonation - No Persistent Side Effects
testResults.notes: Requires Admin SPA impersonation session. Depends on AUTH-043.

observations.description: AUTH-009: Error message says 'This email is already registered with us' but does NOT suggest login or password reset as expected by the test case.
AUTH-030: 'Addresses' link is missing from the User group in the account sidebar. Test case expected it. May be intentional for B2B org users (addresses managed at company level).
AUTH-034: Mobile touch targets measured at 40px height, slightly below the 44px WCAG recommendation. Functional but suboptimal for accessibility.
AUTH-028: 'Login on behalf' feature not available from storefront company members page. Only Edit role, Block user, Delete options exist. Feature appears to be Admin SPA-only.
Test account created accidentally during AUTH-007 max char test: testmaxlen@example.com. Account likely pending email verification. Needs cleanup via Admin SPA.

items: Delete test account: testmaxlen@example.com (created during AUTH-007 max characters test)
